name: Tarragon Chicken with Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon fresh tarragon chopped or 1 teaspoon, dried
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large frying pan, melt the butter over medium heat. Add the mushrooms and cook for about 5 minutes, until lightly browned. Remove from the pan and set aside.
2. Season the chicken pieces with salt and pepper. In the same large frying pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the chicken and cook for about 5 minutes on each side, until browned.
3. Drain off excess fat from the chicken. Pour in the white wine and tarragon (fresh chopped or dried). Cover, reduce the heat to low, and simmer for 25 minutes. Return the reserved mushrooms to the pan and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
